positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a glowing bioluminescent forest. Include tiny woodland creatures (foxes, badgers) interacting with giant glowing mushrooms and ferns. Watercolor and ink style, deep emerald and sapphire color palette, storybook illustration, high contrast, Studio Ghibli inspired.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
